summary: Completed full backend (pytest, 9/9 passed) and frontend (Playwright) testing of PlayerLab landing page. All API endpoints work: GET /api/ returns ok, POST /api/registrations accepts valid payloads (201) and rejects invalid inputs (422) for missing fields, bad email, age out of bounds (5/30) and invalid lab_interest. GET /api/registrations lists with most-recent-first ordering. GET /api/stats returns total_registrations + labs. Frontend renders the Portuguese hero 'DESENVOLVE O TEU JOGO' with no console errors; all required data-testid elements present (hero CTAs, navbar-join-btn, lab-card-technique/performance/position, faq-item-1..5, location-map iframe, final-cta-btn, footer, registration-dialog, form fields and form-submit-btn). FAQ accordion expands on click (aria-expanded=true). Registration dialog opens from navbar/hero/final CTA; submitting a valid form shows registration-success state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') (Pydantic/Starlette warning). Consider migrating to lifespan handler for future FastAPI versions.

server.py stores created_at as ISO string in MongoDB then converts back to datetime on read; consider storing as native BSON datetime for proper sort semantics. Current implementation still sorts correctly because ISO-8601 strings sort lexicographically.
No rate limiting or duplicate-email protection on POST /api/registrations — anyone can spam the form; consider adding a unique index on email or basic IP throttling for production.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers will reject when credentials are sent. Acceptable here as no credentials/auth, but worth noting.
test_credentials: N/A - public landing page, no auth
seed_data_creation: Test created a few TEST_-prefixed registrations in MongoDB collection 'registrations' (test_joao@example.com, test_all@example.com, test_ui@example.com). Safe to leave; can be removed by deleting docs with email LIKE 'test_%'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers /api/, /api/stats, POST validation matrix and create+list persistence. Frontend has comprehensive data-testid coverage (see ALL TESTIDS in tool logs). Registration dialog flow verified end-to-end via navbar, hero-primary-cta and final-cta-btn; success state shown via [data-testid=registration-success]. No console errors detected on initial load. networkidle waits time out due to map iframe — use domcontentloaded + small wait instead.
